# Nabin Nepali
> Machine Learning Engineer & AI Automation Expert based in Kathmandu, Nepal

Nabin Nepali is a Machine Learning Engineer and AI Automation Specialist at Tridev Innovation, Kathmandu. He builds production-ready AI systems, intelligent n8n automation workflows, computer vision applications using YOLO, and scalable ML solutions for businesses in Nepal and globally. Currently pursuing BSc.IT at Techspire College (CGPA 3.5).

## Contact

- Email: nabinepali012@gmail.com
- Phone: +977-9829592158
- Location: Shankhamul, Kathmandu, Nepal
- Website: https://nabinnepali.com.np
- GitHub: https://github.com/nabinphoenix
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nabinnepali
- ResearchGate: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Nabin-Nepali-2

## Work Experience

### Machine Learning Engineer Intern — Tridev Innovation (Sep 2025 – Present)
- Architecting production-ready Computer Vision systems using YOLO-based object detection for real-time industrial applications
- Engineering complex AI automation ecosystems with n8n to optimize business operations
- Developing high-performance FastAPI infrastructures for ML model deployment
- Designing self-healing 24/7 intelligent workflows that automate critical business processes
- Translating business requirements into scalable, practical AI solutions

## Skills

### Machine Learning & AI
Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, OpenCV, YOLO (object detection), SARIMAX/ARIMA (time series forecasting), NLP, Computer Vision, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Transfer Learning

### AI Automation
n8n (workflow automation), AI Agents, Google Gemini AI, Pinecone Vector DB, Airtable, Slack API, REST API integration

### Backend & APIs
FastAPI, Python, JWT authentication, MongoDB, MySQL

### Frontend
React, Next.js, JavaScript

### Other Tools
Git, Docker (basic), Postman

### Soft Skills
Leadership, Problem Solving, Fast Learning, Team Collaboration, Communication, Brainstorming

## Projects

### To-Do List CRUD API (Aug 2024)
Secure RESTful API built with FastAPI and MongoDB. Implements full CRUD operations, JWT-based user authentication, and password hashing.
Technologies: FastAPI, MongoDB, JWT, Python
URL: https://nabinnepali.com.np/projects/1

### Energy Consumption Forecasting (Jul 2025)
Time series forecasting model using SARIMAX to predict energy consumption patterns. Includes data preprocessing, model training, and confidence interval evaluation.
Technologies: SARIMAX, Python, Statsmodels, Time Series Analysis
URL: https://nabinnepali.com.np/projects/2

### CNN Cat vs Dog Classification (Jun 2025)
Binary image classification using a custom CNN in PyTorch. Achieved high accuracy through data augmentation, transfer learning, and hyperparameter tuning.
Technologies: PyTorch, CNN, Python, Computer Vision
URL: https://nabinnepali.com.np/projects/3

### Automated Blog Generation Engine (Dec 2025)
AI system that turns a website into a self-sustaining content engine. Generates, formats, and publishes blog posts automatically.
Technologies: n8n, Google Gemini 2.5 Flash, Google Sheets API, REST API
URL: https://nabinnepali.com.np/projects/101

### Maya — AI Shopping Assistant (Dec 2025)
End-to-end e-commerce order processing AI agent. Handles product search through order confirmation with zero human intervention in under 2 seconds.
Technologies: n8n, Google Gemini AI, MongoDB, Pinecone Vector DB
URL: https://nabinnepali.com.np/projects/102

### Smart Feedback Classification & Automation Agent (Dec 2025)
Fully automated AI-driven system that classifies, routes, and acknowledges user feedback submissions in real-time.
Technologies: n8n, Google Gemini 2.0 Flash, Airtable, Slack API
URL: https://nabinnepali.com.np/projects/103
